title: fraxinus papillosa
intro: Fraxinus papillosa, also known as the hairy ash tree, is a species of deciduous tree belonging to the Oleaceae family. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus papillosa include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. Fraxinus papillosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
